case_title: CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY CO., INC. VS TANNER WELDING, INC.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY CO., INC.
